description_long: This is a modern grave monument composed primarily of polished gray granite, set on a rectangular concrete base. The headstone is upright and rectangular, featuring a vertical engraved cross and visible inscriptions, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface. The grave cover is a flat, rectangular slab of matching granite, bordered by a raised edge and a black accent strip along one side. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with clean lines and a somber color palette. The monument is solid and heavy, intended to be a permanent fixture in a cemetery or memorial park. The inscriptions and cross are etched into the stone, providing both identification and symbolic meaning.
description: A modern gray granite grave monument with an upright headstone, engraved cross, and flat grave cover on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright headstone with a vertical engraved cross and the flat grave cover.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the grave cover.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstone and the full length of the grave cover slab.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the headstone's profile and the black accent strip along the grave cover.
